meta.title: Imbra — Software & Industrial Engineering
meta.description: Imbra builds software products and delivers engineering services for industrial environments.

hero.headline: Complex inside.
hero.sub: Imbra helps industrial companies connect, monitor, and modernise their automation systems — building the software layer between plant floor and IT that most vendors won't touch. One engineer, full accountability, transparent pricing.

stats.label: Years in Industrial Automation, Communication & Software Engineering
Transparent Pricing
stats.sub: Published rates · No hidden fees · No vendor lock-in

stats.label: Domain Bridge
stats.sub: From sensor level to cloud · PLC to REST API

contact.headline: The complexity is
contact.sub: Project engagements · Plugin services · Maintenance contracts · Available on-site across Europe

footer.about: Imbra is a one-engineer consultancy. Branimir Georgiev — founder, designer, and builder — handles every engagement personally. No handoffs, no account managers, no one to call when the person who built it has moved on. Based in Varna, Bulgaria (EU, CET+1). Available on-site across Europe. Remote-first for all other engagements. Specialising in OT/IT integration, industrial historian systems, communication protocol SDKs, and bespoke engineering services. For continuity, all engagements are fully documented — architecture, playbooks, and source code are client-owned and transferable.
